headline: Experts Warn: Companies Cutting Headcount to Boost Efficiency May Be Betting on the Wrong Future
summary: A recent Motley Fool Hidden Gems Investing segment featured guests Phil LeBrun, former international CIO of McDonald’s, and Dr. Jana Werner, executive advisor at AWS, who are co-authors of the book The Octopus Organization. The book describes how successful companies continue to evolve rather than declaring victory and standing still. Their core warning is aimed ... Experts Warn: Companies Cutting Headcount to Boost Efficiency May Be Betting on the Wrong Future

headline: How McDonald’s (MCD) Is Using Its NEXT Strategy to Protect Growth and Restaurant Productivity
summary: McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is one of Kevin O’Leary’s top stock picks for 2026 through the O’Shares U.S. Quality Dividend ETF. The stock made up 3.53% of the ETF as of June 17, 2026. On June 1, 2026, McDonald’s introduced McDonald’s > NEXT, a new systemwide strategy aimed at driving growth and restaurant productivity. The company […]
